ab: kyan yaw su soni?
ch: M:你今天有空嘛?
en: Are you available today?

ab: mhcwa?
ch: W:怎麼了?
en: What is the matter?

ab: halan misu mita ki.
ch: M:我想去拜訪你。
en: I would like to visit you.

ab: iyat cu kaki sali, kyan yaw mu soni, babaw nya la ki.
ch: W:我今天有事不在家。改天吧。
en: I am out today. How about another day?

ab: cuxan ga kyan yaw su? halan misu hkani hmenas cka wagi ki.
ch: M:那你明天有空嗎?我下午去找你。
en: Then, are you available tomorrow? I’ll visit you tomorrow afternoon.

ab: ang, n_gong misu beh sali mu.
ch: W:可以，我在家等你。
en: Sure, I will wait for you at home.

ab: kyalaw misu cikah ana mu pgalan hngiyang su? brwan maku biru.
ch: M:請問我可以錄音嗎?我想做紀錄。
en: Would you mind if  I do the voice recording? I would like to keep a record.

ab: aw ga, ana.
ch: W:好啊!沒有問題。
en: Sure! No problem.

ab: ana misu pgalan c’oli su?
ch: M:可以錄影嗎?
en: Would you mind if I do the video recording?

ab: ya’eh texan kyasan mu, stetay ci khu mu uyi, ana ini pgaliy.
ch: W:我不好看，倉庫也沒整理，不要照啦。
en: No, I am plain and the warehouse hasn’t been tidied up yet.

ab: nanu siy misu pgaliy syasing nanak la ki.
ch: M:那我拍照就好。
en: Then I will just take photos.

ab: iyat caku cyaxiy syasing uyi.
ch: W:拍照也不要。
en: No photographing either.

ab: mhway su swalan caku mwah tkba yaw isu.
ch: M:謝謝你讓我訪問。
en: Thank you for accepting the interview.

ab: ana, lalu kyalun su?
ch: W:沒問題，你想問什麼?
en: You are welcome. What would you like to know?

ab: kyalaw misu cikah, maki su mrkyas ga lalu tyawun su?
ch: M:請問您年輕時是做什麼的?
en: What do you do when you are young?

ab: maki lela ga knsat caku, ana ga wa caku malax la.
ch: W:我以前是警察，但我現在退休了。
en: I was a police officer but I am retired now.

ab: kyan tyawun su micu?
ch: M:那你現在有工作嗎?
en: Then, are you working at the moment?

ab: nyu caku tiyaw beh pwasan biru micu la.
ch: W:我在學校上班。
en: I am working at school.

ab: kyalaw misa cikah, nyu maki beh alang ta la’i su uyi?
ch: M:請問您的孩子也住在部落嗎?
en: Do your kids live in the tribe too?

ab: ungat, cyu maki beh maci la’i maki iya.
ch: W:不，我的孩子在都市居住。
en: No, my kids are all living in the city.

ab: isu nanak utux nyu maki hani la?
ch: M:那你自己一個人住嗎?
en: Then, do you live by yourself?

ab: nyu cu sma’an utux hoyin ru utux piyit, utux sali maku naha uyi.
ch: W:我還有養一隻狗和一隻鳥，他們也是我的家人。
en: I also keep a dog and a bird. They are my family.

ab: cyu caku sma’an utux ’ngyaw uyi, kyan mnayat ta sinu sbes ga ini siy kliyang.
ch: M:我也有養一隻貓，有動物陪伴不會無聊。
en: I have a cat too. I won’t get bored with the company of my pet.

ab: tba’ay misu cikah, yaw na Gaga psani mluyak.
ch: M:我想請問你關於打獵的禁忌。
en: I would like to ask you about the taboos of hunting.

ab: ini piyux ba’un mu, ana ga ba’un mu kmayan ga kyalun misa kwara.
ch: W:我知道的不多，但我能回答的都會回答你。
en: I don’t know much about that, but I will tell you everything I know.

ab: y’aya na mluyak ga maki lalu psani nya?
ch: M:你們打獵的武器有什麼禁忌嗎?
en: Do you have any taboos about hunting weapons?

ab: y’aya na mluyak ga ya’eh tringan ku knerin.
ch: W:打獵的武器不可以讓女生碰到。
en: Our hunting weapons are untouchable to women.

ab: ana mosa mlu mluyak nku knerin haca?
ch: M:那女人可以一起去打獵嗎?
en: Then, can women go hunting together?

ab: ba’a la, ba’a thoyay mosa mluyak knerin iya la.
ch: W:不行，女人也不可以打獵。
en: No, women cannot go hunting either.
